title: Two-seed RealMLP weighted average
summary: Replace the equal two-seed average with a tiny OOF-selected weighted average over the existing two seed predictions.
rationale: The two RealMLP seeds may not contribute exactly equal quality or diversity. A small weight grid tests whether a slightly asymmetric blend improves AUC without introducing a meta-model or stacker.
implementation_hint: Start from the parent two-seed RealMLP average code. Keep both RealMLP experts unchanged. Evaluate a small OOF-only weight grid such as 0.40/0.60, 0.45/0.55, 0.50/0.50, 0.55/0.45, and 0.60/0.40. Select the best OOF AUC weight and apply it to test predictions. Do not add any new model or feature.
expected_effect: Slightly improve OOF AUC if one seed is consistently stronger while the second still adds diversity.
risk: OOF-selected weights can overfit small validation noise.
